$comment: List the BGG usernames whose collections should be baked into data/games.json. The GitHub Action reads this file. 'id' is a short internal key, 'label' is what shows in the UI. Add more entries to pull a whole friend group.

options.$comment: Which BGG statuses to pull per user. Leave own=true for a 'what can we play tonight' shelf. These combine with OR and the app can't tell them apart, so only enable wishlist/preordered if you truly want those games mixed in.
